message:
feat(tables): Complete Phase 3 rich_rust migration (P3.6-P3.8)

P3.6: Update scan command to use ScanResultsTable
- Updated print_scan_pretty() to use ScanResultsTable with auto_theme()
- Added ScanResultRow::from_scan_finding() conversion method
- Fixed test_long_command_truncation with appropriate max_width

P3.7: Preserve Markdown table output
- Already implemented: render() checks is_markdown() and falls back to comfy-table

P3.8: Add rich_rust-specific unit tests
- Added 7 new feature-gated tests for rich_rust rendering:
  - test_rich_scan_table_uses_rounded_borders
  - test_rich_scan_table_severity_markup
  - test_rich_stats_table_basic
  - test_rich_pack_list_table_basic
  - test_rich_table_respects_width
  - test_ascii_style_uses_ascii_chars
  - test_markdown_uses_comfy_table

Fixed rich_rust API usage:
- BoxStyle → BoxChars constants from rich_rust::r#box
- add_column() → with_column() builder pattern
- Row::new().cell() → Row::new(vec![Cell...])
- table.to_string() → segments_to_string(table.render(width))

All 1920 tests pass with rich-output feature.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
